settings.heading: IPL Trophy Price in India — Replica Cost, Facts & Where to Buy
settings.subheading: How much does the IPL trophy cost, what is it made of, and how can you buy a custom IPL-style replica trophy for your own cricket tournament? Clear answers — plus replica pricing from Meru Trophy, Bangalore.
settings.price_caption: Meru Trophy makes IPL-style cup replicas for local and corporate tournaments. These are custom tribute trophies, not official BCCI/IPL merchandise.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: The official IPL trophy is a custom-made silver-and-gold-finished cup commissioned by the BCCI; it is not sold publicly, so it has no retail "price." If you want an IPL-style replica trophy for your own tournament, custom replicas from Meru Trophy start around ₹999 for table-top sizes and go up to ₹15,000+ for large presentation cups. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252 for a quote.

settings.heading: Why the official IPL trophy has no fixed price
settings.text: The IPL winners' trophy is a one-off commissioned piece, handed to the champion franchise each season — it isn't a retail product, so figures you see online are estimates of fabrication cost, not a buy price. What people usually want when they search "IPL trophy price" is one of two things: a sense of how valuable the real cup is, or a way to buy a replica for a gully, corporate or tennis-ball tournament. This page answers both.

settings.heading: Quick facts about the IPL & cricket cup trophies
settings.text:
• The IPL trophy is a custom silver cup with gold-coloured detailing, re-made/refurbished for presentation each season.
  • It is not available for public sale — only the champion team receives a version.
  • Replica and tribute trophies for local tournaments are widely made by trophy manufacturers like Meru Trophy.
  • Cricket World Cup and other tournament cups are similarly bespoke, not retail-priced items.

settings.question: How much does the real IPL trophy cost?
settings.answer: There's no public retail price — it's a custom-commissioned cup, not sold to the public. Reported figures are estimates of how much it costs to make, not a price you can pay to buy it.

settings.question: Can I buy an IPL trophy replica in India?
settings.answer: You can't buy official merchandise of the trophy, but you can order a custom IPL-style replica cup for your own tournament. Meru Trophy makes these from ₹999 (table-top) to ₹15,000+ (large presentation cups), engraved with your tournament name.

settings.question: What about the Cricket World Cup trophy price?
settings.answer: Like the IPL cup, the ICC World Cup trophy is bespoke and not retailed publicly. For your own event you can order a World-Cup-style replica — ask us for sizes and pricing.

settings.question: How long to make a custom cricket cup?
settings.answer: Standard replicas ship in 3–5 business days after design approval; large or plated custom cups need 7–10 days. Tell us your final date and we'll plan backwards.

settings.heading: Want an IPL-style cup for your tournament?
settings.text: Send your tournament name, prize size and date — we'll share replica options and a quote.
